TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Morocco u Morocco sa i labu nu Africa , itiza i 32 00 N, 5 00 W u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 446,550 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 446,300 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 250 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 33,655,786. kakalukan umah sa 67.50%, kilakilangan umah sa 11.50%, zumaay henay umah sa 21%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Rabat . kakingingan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 7 bulad 30 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal ayza sa ci Mohammed VI of Morocco u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ), micakat a demiad sa i 1999 a mihca 6 bulad 23 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Morocco ayza sa ci Saadeddine Othmani , micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihcaan 3 bulad 17 demiad. śįĎśóŹšłĽÁĺ©VS. mingcu cuiy Palesetan a tademaw Morocco kuowan a kaalawan namaka Muo-luoke a kawaw amiadih, mihang ci Muhammad (Muo-han-muo-de Á©ÜÁĹēťĽėŚĺ∑) saka enem a sa mihang tu I-se-lei masasungay sa, mihang tu tademawan nu nutipanay a Sahara (Si-sa-ha-la Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) a binacadan nu balucu', mikikaka tu Palestine a tademaw nuni palekalan. Muo-luoke a tademaw palekal tu Palestine (Pa-le-se-tan Ś∑īŚčíśĖĮŚĚ¶) a kawaw, Muo-luoke mialaw tu walian Jerusalem (Ye-lu-sa-len śĚĪŤÄ∂Ť∑ĮśííŚÜ∑) a Israel (Yi-se-lei šĽ•ŤČ≤Śąó) masasungaay, alaci kalingesan nu tademawan, miadada tu balucu' nu kuowan itida i masilutay a Muslim (Mu-se-lin Á©ÜśĖĮśěó) nu balucu' "midiputay tu singciw " a wayway. sisa manamuh ku Amilika palutadengaay tu Muo-luoke misuayaw tu nutipanay a Sahara (Si-sa-ha-la Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) a kakuwawnan, malahica ku hatidaay a kawaw. Muo-luoke sakakaay ci Nasser Bourita mihapu tu cen-hu tina kawawan pabalucu satu patalaw musakamu, "anucima kina mipalulcusay tina kawawan a tademaw, u mihantay tu Muo-luoke tu nutipanay a Sahara (Si-sa-ha-la Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) a kawaw". Muo-luoke atu Israel (Yi-se-lei šĽ•ŤČ≤Śąó) amica kuni kacaay kalecabay nuheni, nina tusaay a kanatal a hitay atu kawaw u masasukapahy tu kunuheni. sisa u Amilika sumad hantu nu pinaay a mihcaan misuayaw tu nutipanay a Sahara (Si-sa-ha-la Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) a nikalecabayan, kiya u Muo-luoke u sakatawidan nu saka silaculan. Morocco (Mo-Luo-Ke likisi śĎ©śīõŚď•ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ micapi tu ayda a sepatay a bataan (40) a mang nu mihcaan idaw ku mukasiay a Morocco a tademaw misaculilculi tu. saan kumikinkiway a tademaw nanu tawyatu ku tademaw idaw tu kumuenengan. satabalay nu itidaay a mueneng u Puo-Puo-El a tademaw tada matenes tu caay tu kakatinengi a misilut. pitu a seci, Arabian (A-La-Puo a tademaw ťėŅśčČšľĮšļļ) taynitu, i walu a se-ci patidengtu tu wankuo. teban nu seci inuw tu mikuwawn tu tademaw idaw ku Puo-puo-e a tademawan, idaw ku Arabian (A-La-Puo a tademawan ťėŅśčČšľĮšļļ). nu layak nisilitan a cudad nu Morocco numatabalay anisulitan, idaw ku Sun a tademaw ci Caw-zu-se "cufanseŤęłŤēÉŚŅó""Muo-cia-lai kanatal ". namaka sabaw tu lima a se-ci malinga tu, Morocco debungan nu pina a nutipanay nukanatal. tusa a bataan (20) a se-ci tu ayaw Morocco katalawan u nuheni ku misatadasay amalepacaw nu angnganan a kitakit. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tusa (1912) a mihcaan tulu a bulad, Fa-kuo France midebung tu Morocco . cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku enem (1956) a mihacaan tulu a bulad, misiteked tu kunuheni. . aydaay a Morocco A-La-Wye wancaw itini i sabaw tu pitu (17) a se-ci malingatu, cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku pitu (1957) a mihcaan, Morocco Sudan.muhan.muode (Sultan Muhammad) lima a se mihapu misumad tu kuowan. Morocco Sudan a kanatal sumad han tu Muoluo ke wankuo . misanga tu cun-cu lisince, nika u cuncu mikikaka tu mikuliay atu kuohua a kawawan, sisa u sakatusa a cun-cu-ce a kawawan. sakaudip Morocco pakay kankanngan tu buting a kawawśĎ©śīõŚď•ť≠öÁĹźť†≠ÁĒĘś•≠ Morocco anganganan nu sakaudip u aidangan, mibutingay atu linsun-kun a sakatahelan misiwbay, unisupedan tu linsun-en cacay a malebut cacay a lasubu (1100) a walwalan a dun', sakakaay nu kitakit. sakayliwmah atu papahabayan u anganganan tu, nika mikitabaki tu demiad. Morocco miida tu yadah nu mipadangay nuheniyan, Fa-Kuo u saka tusa mamipadang a kanatal, Si-Pan-Ya ku satabakiay amipadanay a kanatal. 1.4%. mahaymaw ku sakaudip. tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010) a mihcaan Morocco sakasilaculan makaala tu siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu (917) a walwalan a kalisiw nu Amilika , hikin han nu tademaw sa tusa a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku siwa a kalisiwan nu Amilika . sakaudip mucelak tu (3.2%), mawada' ku kalisiw matekes ku tuud tu (1.4%). lalangaw Arabic (Ala-puo a kamu ťėŅśčČšľĮŤ™ě) u tada kamu, nika u Puo-Puo a kamuatu atu France (Fa-Kuo ś≥ēŚúč) a kamu palutatengan ku pabaway tu tina kamuwawan, Yise-lan-ciw u tada kiwkay nuheni. cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1993) a mihcaan walu a bulad milaksisiki ci Hasan e'se tu Cin-cense , ueneng itida i Kasa-pulan-ka mitepal tu Tasiyung a bayu , u sanglacay a talise ku sapisangan', upapaypayan talakaw makaala tu tusa a lasubu (200) a lawat, mikilul tu Maycia-cingcen-se atu Ay-ci nu Ace-ha-elcing-cense sakatulu nu tabakiay a kitakit nu Cingcen-se , kapah kuyu siki i labu itini i E-se-lan a kitakitan u taludu'ku sakasenengan. maaalaw tu lalať†ėŚúüÁą≠Ť≠į Morocco mimedmed tu nutipanay a Sahara a niyadu tu walu (80%) a kilac nu lala'. namakayda i Morocco tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku enem (1956) a mihcaan nami siteked satu atu kuowan ci Muhammad lima a se namapatay satu, ci kuowan Ha-sang ese mihapu tu yadahay a lala'. namahida atu Si-pan-ya malepacaw tu Yifu-ni kalepacawan maalaw ku Ta-elfa-ya a lala' (Ś°ĒÁąĺś≥ēšļěŚúįŚł∂ Tarfaya Strip), manglay henay tu Siwta atu Mye-lili-ya atu Sahara (Sa-Ha-La śííŚďąśčČ) aniyadu idaw kuyu anup nuhini a mangalay tuya lalaan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tulu (1963) a mihcaan Ael-cili-ya (ťėŅÁąĺŚŹäŚą©šļě Algeria) misiteked satu alaw malepacaw, Mu-ruke madebung tu Ael-cili-ya nutipanay a Tindu-fu atu Paisa-el , sakamusa lala' numakau ku Mu-ruke . tinika sasuadaan tu cacay a bulad anikalepacawan atu pina nu lasubu kuyu mapatay a tademaw caayhenay kasasulul. caay henay kalimad a zitay tulingatu, Mu-ruke a tademaw, micidekay ku Mu-ruke misitekeday a tademaw, tinaku sa Allal al-Fassi, Mo-Luo-Ke śĎ©śīõŚď•) pisitekedan tu pina a mihcaan miyukiw mangalay misaahebal tu lala'. caay pisulul ku Sudan tinakamuwan. Al-Fassi a nabalucuan nida itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan idaw ku pacukelay tini kawaw nida, katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku siwa (1969) a mihcaan,Mu-ruke nanutiyatu palutatengan tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan tunipisiteked nuu Maw-lita-niya . nika sasuadaan tu pina a mihcaan. Maw-lita-niya maynah tu Mu-ruke miliheda tu saka balihenawan a nikalepacawan , midebung tu lala', itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan (1970) a mihcaan , nika sasuadaan itini i Sisa-hala malingatu asikawaw. amica ku Mu-ruke sifu pacici u Sisa-hala atu amisan a Spain babahelan, Siw-ta atu Mye-lili-ya u tadalala niyam sa, nika tabakiya a Mu-ruke a lala misaayaw itini i cacaya a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan paalesan nu Mu-ruke . tayhiwan nu Sala-wi-ala-puo a micu a kapulungan a kanatal a Puo-lisa'-liaw' maalatu nu fa-mun a tademaw.

tasijuŇč a baju , u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a tar~…ĺis…ô ku sapisaŇčan Ē~ °, upapajpajan tar~…ĺakaw makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu (***) a r~…ĺawat, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu maj ¶ia- ¶iŇč ¶…ôn-s…ô atu aj- ¶i nu a idaw ku …ôn…ôm (****) a mińß ¶aan nami sit…ôk…ôd satu atu kuowan ¶i muńßammad r~…ĺima a s…ô namapataj satu, ¶i kuowan ńßa-saŇč …ôs…ô mińßapu tu jadańßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. namańßida atu si-pan-ja mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu jifu-ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan maar~…ĺaw ku ta-…ôr~…ĺfa-ja a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° (****** tarfaja strip), maŇčr~…ĺaj ńß…ônaj tu siwta atu mj…ô-r~…ĺir~…ĺi-ja atu sańßara (sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa ***) anijadu idaw kuju anup nuńßini a maŇčar~…ĺaj tuja r~…ĺar~…ĺaan. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan a…ôr~…ĺ- ¶ir~…ĺi-ja (***** ar~…ĺg…ôria) misit…ôk…ôd satu ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, mu-ruk…ô mad…ôbuŇč tu a…ôr~…ĺ- ¶ir~…ĺi-ja nutipanaj a tindu-fu atu paisa-…ôr~…ĺ , sakamusa r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° numakau ku mu-ruk…ô . tinika sasuadaan tu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad anikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan atu pina nu r~…ĺasubu kuju mapataj a tad…ômaw ¶aajńß…ônaj kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ. ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kar~…ĺimad a zitaj tur~…ĺiŇčatu, mu-ruk…ô a tad…ômaw, mi ¶id…ôkaj ku mu-ruk…ô misit…ôk…ôdaj a tad…ômaw, tinaku sa ar~…ĺr~…ĺar~…ĺ ar~…ĺ-fassi, mo-r~…ĺuo-k…ô ***) pisit…ôk…ôdan tu pina a mińß ¶aan mijukiw maŇčar~…ĺaj misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ¶aaj pisur~…ĺur~…ĺ ku sudan tinakamuwan. ar~…ĺ-fassi a nabar~…ĺu ¶uan nida itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan idaw ku pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺaj tini kawaw nida, katukuńß i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku siwa (****) a mińß ¶aan,mu-ruk…ô nanutijatu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan tunipisit…ôk…ôd nuu maw-r~…ĺita-nija . nika sasuadaan tu pina a mińß ¶aan. maw-r~…ĺita-nija majnańß tu mu-ruk…ô mir~…ĺińß…ôda tu saka bar~…ĺińß…ônawan a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan , mid…ôbuŇč tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan , nika sasuadaan itini i sisa-ńßar~…ĺa mar~…ĺiŇčatu asikawaw. ami ¶a ku mu-ruk…ô sifu pa ¶i ¶i u sisa-ńßar~…ĺa atu amisan a spain babańß…ôr~…ĺan, siw-ta atu mj…ô-r~…ĺir~…ĺi-ja u tadar~…ĺar~…ĺa nijam sa, nika tabakija a mu-ruk…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺa misaajaw itini i ¶a ¶aja a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan paar~…ĺ…ôsan nu mu-ruk…ô . tajńßiwan nu sar~…ĺa-wi-ar~…ĺa-puo a mi ¶u a kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ a puo-r~…ĺisa Ē~ °-r~…ĺiaw Ē~ ° maar~…ĺatu nu fa-mun a tad…ômaw.
S.FORM: Morocco u Morocco sa i labu nu Africa , itiza i 32 00 N, 5 00 W u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 446,550 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 446,300 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 250 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 33,655,786. kakalukan umah sa 67.50%, kilakilangan umah sa 11.50%, zumaay henay umah sa 21%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Rabat . kakingingan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 7 bulad 30 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal ayza sa ci Mohammed VI of Morocco u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ), micakat a demiad sa i 1999 a mihca 6 bulad 23 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Morocco ayza sa ci Saadeddine Othmani , micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihcaan 3 bulad 17 demiad. śįĎśóŹšłĽÁĺ©VS. mingcu cuiy Palesetan a tademaw Morocco kuowan a kaalawan namaka Muo-luoke a kawaw amiadih, mihang ci Muhammad (Muo-han-muo-de Á©ÜÁĹēťĽėŚĺ∑) saka enem a sa mihang tu I-se-lei masasungay sa, mihang tu tademawan nu nutipanay a Sahara (Si-sa-ha-la Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) a binacadan nu balucu', mikikaka tu Palestine a tademaw nuni palekalan. Muo-luoke a tademaw palekal tu Palestine (Pa-le-se-tan Ś∑īŚčíśĖĮŚĚ¶) a kawaw, Muo-luoke mialaw tu walian Jerusalem (Ye-lu-sa-len śĚĪŤÄ∂Ť∑ĮśííŚÜ∑) a Israel (Yi-se-lei šĽ•ŤČ≤Śąó) masasungaay, alaci kalingesan nu tademawan, miadada tu balucu' nu kuowan itida i masilutay a Muslim (Mu-se-lin Á©ÜśĖĮśěó) nu balucu' "midiputay tu singciw " a wayway. sisa manamuh ku Amilika palutadengaay tu Muo-luoke misuayaw tu nutipanay a Sahara (Si-sa-ha-la Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) a kakuwawnan, malahica ku hatidaay a kawaw. Muo-luoke sakakaay ci Nasser Bourita mihapu tu cen-hu tina kawawan pabalucu satu patalaw musakamu, "anucima kina mipalulcusay tina kawawan a tademaw, u mihantay tu Muo-luoke tu nutipanay a Sahara (Si-sa-ha-la Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) a kawaw". Muo-luoke atu Israel (Yi-se-lei šĽ•ŤČ≤Śąó) amica kuni kacaay kalecabay nuheni, nina tusaay a kanatal a hitay atu kawaw u masasukapahy tu kunuheni. sisa u Amilika sumad hantu nu pinaay a mihcaan misuayaw tu nutipanay a Sahara (Si-sa-ha-la Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) a nikalecabayan, kiya u Muo-luoke u sakatawidan nu saka silaculan. Morocco (Mo-Luo-Ke likisi śĎ©śīõŚď•ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ micapi tu ayda a sepatay a bataan (40) a mang nu mihcaan idaw ku mukasiay a Morocco a tademaw misaculilculi tu. saan kumikinkiway a tademaw nanu tawyatu ku tademaw idaw tu kumuenengan. satabalay nu itidaay a mueneng u Puo-Puo-El a tademaw tada matenes tu caay tu kakatinengi a misilut. pitu a seci, Arabian (A-La-Puo a tademaw ťėŅśčČšľĮšļļ) taynitu, i walu a se-ci patidengtu tu wankuo. teban nu seci inuw tu mikuwawn tu tademaw idaw ku Puo-puo-e a tademawan, idaw ku Arabian (A-La-Puo a tademawan ťėŅśčČšľĮšļļ). nu layak nisilitan a cudad nu Morocco numatabalay anisulitan, idaw ku Sun a tademaw ci Caw-zu-se "cufanseŤęłŤēÉŚŅó""Muo-cia-lai kanatal ". namaka sabaw tu lima a se-ci malinga tu, Morocco debungan nu pina a nutipanay nukanatal. tusa a bataan (20) a se-ci tu ayaw Morocco katalawan u nuheni ku misatadasay amalepacaw nu angnganan a kitakit. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tusa (1912) a mihcaan tulu a bulad, Fa-kuo France midebung tu Morocco . cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku enem (1956) a mihacaan tulu a bulad, misiteked tu kunuheni. . aydaay a Morocco A-La-Wye wancaw itini i sabaw tu pitu (17) a se-ci malingatu, cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku pitu (1957) a mihcaan, Morocco Sudan.muhan.muode (Sultan Muhammad) lima a se mihapu misumad tu kuowan. Morocco Sudan a kanatal sumad han tu Muoluo ke wankuo . misanga tu cun-cu lisince, nika u cuncu mikikaka tu mikuliay atu kuohua a kawawan, sisa u sakatusa a cun-cu-ce a kawawan. sakaudip Morocco pakay kankanngan tu buting a kawawśĎ©śīõŚď•ť≠öÁĹźť†≠ÁĒĘś•≠ Morocco anganganan nu sakaudip u aidangan, mibutingay atu linsun-kun a sakatahelan misiwbay, unisupedan tu linsun-en cacay a malebut cacay a lasubu (1100) a walwalan a dun', sakakaay nu kitakit. sakayliwmah atu papahabayan u anganganan tu, nika mikitabaki tu demiad. Morocco miida tu yadah nu mipadangay nuheniyan, Fa-Kuo u saka tusa mamipadang a kanatal, Si-Pan-Ya ku satabakiay amipadanay a kanatal. 1.4%. mahaymaw ku sakaudip. tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010) a mihcaan Morocco sakasilaculan makaala tu siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu (917) a walwalan a kalisiw nu Amilika , hikin han nu tademaw sa tusa a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku siwa a kalisiwan nu Amilika . sakaudip mucelak tu (3.2%), mawada' ku kalisiw matekes ku tuud tu (1.4%). lalangaw Arabic (Ala-puo a kamu ťėŅśčČšľĮŤ™ě) u tada kamu, nika u Puo-Puo a kamuatu atu France (Fa-Kuo ś≥ēŚúč) a kamu palutatengan ku pabaway tu tina kamuwawan, Yise-lan-ciw u tada kiwkay nuheni. cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1993) a mihcaan walu a bulad milaksisiki ci Hasan e'se tu Cin-cense , ueneng itida i Kasa-pulan-ka mitepal tu Tasiyung a bayu , u sanglacay a talise ku sapisangan', upapaypayan talakaw makaala tu tusa a lasubu (200) a lawat, mikilul tu Maycia-cingcen-se atu Ay-ci nu Ace-ha-elcing-cense sakatulu nu tabakiay a kitakit nu Cingcen-se , kapah kuyu siki i labu itini i E-se-lan a kitakitan u taludu'ku sakasenengan. maaalaw tu lalať†ėŚúüÁą≠Ť≠į Morocco mimedmed tu nutipanay a Sahara a niyadu tu walu (80%) a kilac nu lala'. namakayda i Morocco tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku enem (1956) a mihcaan nami siteked satu atu kuowan ci Muhammad lima a se namapatay satu, ci kuowan Ha-sang ese mihapu tu yadahay a lala'. namahida atu Si-pan-ya malepacaw tu Yifu-ni kalepacawan maalaw ku Ta-elfa-ya a lala' (Ś°ĒÁąĺś≥ēšļěŚúįŚł∂ Tarfaya Strip), manglay henay tu Siwta atu Mye-lili-ya atu Sahara (Sa-Ha-La śííŚďąśčČ) aniyadu idaw kuyu anup nuhini a mangalay tuya lalaan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tulu (1963) a mihcaan Ael-cili-ya (ťėŅÁąĺŚŹäŚą©šļě Algeria) misiteked satu alaw malepacaw, Mu-ruke madebung tu Ael-cili-ya nutipanay a Tindu-fu atu Paisa-el , sakamusa lala' numakau ku Mu-ruke . tinika sasuadaan tu cacay a bulad anikalepacawan atu pina nu lasubu kuyu mapatay a tademaw caayhenay kasasulul. caay henay kalimad a zitay tulingatu, Mu-ruke a tademaw, micidekay ku Mu-ruke misitekeday a tademaw, tinaku sa Allal al-Fassi, Mo-Luo-Ke śĎ©śīõŚď•) pisitekedan tu pina a mihcaan miyukiw mangalay misaahebal tu lala'. caay pisulul ku Sudan tinakamuwan. Al-Fassi a nabalucuan nida itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan idaw ku pacukelay tini kawaw nida, katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku siwa (1969) a mihcaan,Mu-ruke nanutiyatu palutatengan tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan tunipisiteked nuu Maw-lita-niya . nika sasuadaan tu pina a mihcaan. Maw-lita-niya maynah tu Mu-ruke miliheda tu saka balihenawan a nikalepacawan , midebung tu lala', itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan (1970) a mihcaan , nika sasuadaan itini i Sisa-hala malingatu asikawaw. amica ku Mu-ruke sifu pacici u Sisa-hala atu amisan a Spain babahelan, Siw-ta atu Mye-lili-ya u tadalala niyam sa, nika tabakiya a Mu-ruke a lala misaayaw itini i cacaya a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan paalesan nu Mu-ruke . tayhiwan nu Sala-wi-ala-puo a micu a kapulungan a kanatal a Puo-lisa'-liaw' maalatu nu fa-mun a tademaw.

mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu jifu-ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan maar~…ĺaw ku ta-…ôr~…ĺfa-ja a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° (****** tarfaja strip), maŇčr~…ĺaj ńß…ônaj tu siwta atu mj…ô-r~…ĺir~…ĺi-ja atu sańßara (sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa ***) anijadu idaw kuju anup nuńßini a maŇčar~…ĺaj tuja r~…ĺar~…ĺaan. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan a…ôr~…ĺ- ¶ir~…ĺi-ja (***** ar~…ĺg…ôria) misit…ôk…ôd satu ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, mu-ruk…ô mad…ôbuŇč tu a…ôr~…ĺ- ¶ir~…ĺi-ja nutipanaj a tindu-fu atu paisa-…ôr~…ĺ , sakamusa r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° numakau ku mu-ruk…ô . tinika sasuadaan tu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad anikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan atu pina nu r~…ĺasubu kuju mapataj a tad…ômaw ¶aajńß…ônaj kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ. ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kar~…ĺimad a zitaj tur~…ĺiŇčatu, mu-ruk…ô a tad…ômaw, mi ¶id…ôkaj ku mu-ruk…ô misit…ôk…ôdaj a tad…ômaw, tinaku sa ar~…ĺr~…ĺar~…ĺ ar~…ĺ-fassi, mo-r~…ĺuo-k…ô ***) pisit…ôk…ôdan tu pina a mińß ¶aan mijukiw maŇčar~…ĺaj misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ¶aaj pisur~…ĺur~…ĺ ku sudan tinakamuwan. ar~…ĺ-fassi a nabar~…ĺu ¶uan nida itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan idaw ku pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺaj tini kawaw nida, katukuńß i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku siwa (****) a mińß ¶aan,mu-ruk…ô nanutijatu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan tunipisit…ôk…ôd nuu maw-r~…ĺita-nija . nika sasuadaan tu pina a mińß ¶aan. maw-r~…ĺita-nija majnańß tu mu-ruk…ô mir~…ĺińß…ôda tu saka bar~…ĺińß…ônawan a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan , mid…ôbuŇč tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan , nika sasuadaan itini i sisa-ńßar~…ĺa mar~…ĺiŇčatu asikawaw. ami ¶a ku mu-ruk…ô sifu pa ¶i ¶i u sisa-ńßar~…ĺa atu amisan a spain babańß…ôr~…ĺan, siw-ta atu mj…ô-r~…ĺir~…ĺi-ja u tadar~…ĺar~…ĺa nijam sa, nika tabakija a mu-ruk…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺa misaajaw itini i ¶a ¶aja a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan paar~…ĺ…ôsan nu mu-ruk…ô . tajńßiwan nu sar~…ĺa-wi-ar~…ĺa-puo a mi ¶u a kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ a puo-r~…ĺisa Ē~ °-r~…ĺiaw Ē~ ° maar~…ĺatu nu fa-mun a tad…ômaw.
